name: @spectyra/optimizer-algorithms
description: Core Spectyra optimization algorithms: unitization, spectral analysis, PG-SCC, RefPack, PhraseBook, CodeMap, budgets, profit gate. Pure functions — no external I/O. Distributed as compiled JS only.

scripts.build:minify: tsc --outDir dist --declaration && node -e "/* minification step — add terser/esbuild in CI */"
